name: Sassy Beauty
overview: Si Yan, a top beauty blogger, is accidentally transported into a VR game set in ancient China, where she starts as a lowly maid. Armed with her modern makeup skills and savvy communication, she quickly rises to fame, helping women express themselves through beauty while uncovering their personal stories. Though determined to avoid romance, she finds herself drawn into an unexpected love journey with several charming characters, blending humor, emotion, and romance in a fantastical world.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Sassy Beauty | 潇洒佳人淡淡妆 | Snow Kong 孔雪儿, Kevin Yan 晏紫东 | iQiyi
